name: normative-statement
description: A single atomic normative requirement, expressed using RFC 2119 keywords.

aiGuidance.purpose: A single atomic normative requirement, expressed using RFC 2119 keywords.
aiGuidance.extraction: Each statement should express exactly one requirement. Use MUST, MUST NOT, SHOULD, SHOULD NOT, or MAY. Be precise and testable — a conformance test should be derivable from this statement alone.
